message:
fix: gate cmd_result_to_artifact behind tui feature flag

The cmd_result_to_artifact helper uses e2e_artifact::TestCaseArtifact from
the tui module, which is only available when the tui feature is enabled.
Without this gate, compilation fails when building without the tui feature
because the e2e_artifact types are missing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
